sites.body: Landing pages, personal sites, service pages, and web presence focused on conversion.

consulting.body: Audits, improvement plans, lightweight architecture, and support for product decisions.

audienceItems: You need to launch a clear page without turning it into an endless project.
You have an existing product and want to improve a specific part.
You want to communicate your professional or technical offer more clearly.

Post.title: Placeholder title for the individual article.
Post.description: Current slug: {slug}. This route is ready to connect real content from MDX, a CMS, or local files.

Post.mainBody: Placeholder development with ideas, examples, links, or technical notes. This page can become a template for every post.
